name: José João Ferreira
fullname: José João Alves dos Santos Ferreira
about: Engineer and researcher specializing in formal methods and software verification. My work spans from theoretical logic, like first-order temporal fragments, to practical reliability through MaxSAT solver optimization. I’ve developed custom formalisms for validating data-intensive systems and applied these tools to secure public administration protocols. Whether teaching or benchmarking, I focus on turning rigorous science into high-impact engineering.
